import torch, esm, esm.inverse_folding, numpy as np, pandas as pd, time
import shutil

shutil.copy("{{artifact:9294a301-bcdb-4bc2-9a4a-13cd82745c48}}", "is621_esmfold.pdb")

torch.set_num_threads(48)
seq = ("MEHELHYIGIDTAKEKLDVDVLRPDGRHRTKKFANTTKGHDELVSWLKGHKIDHAHICIEATGTYMEPVA"
       "ECLYDAGYIVSVINPALGKAFAQSEGLRNKTDTVDARMLAEFCRQKRPAAWEAPHPLERALRALVVRHQAL"
       "TDMHTQELNRTETAREVQRPSIDAHLLWLEAELKRLEKQIKDLTDDDPDMKHRRKLLESIPGIGEKTSAVL"
       "LAYIGLKDRFAHARQFAAFAGLTPRRYESGSSVRGASRMSKAGHVSLRRALYMPAMVATSKTEWGRAFRDRL"
       "AANGKKGKVILGAMMRKLAQVAYGVLKSGVPFDASRHNPVAA")
L=len(seq); AAS=list("ACDEFGHIKLMNPQRSTVWY")

print("loading esm_if1 ...", flush=True)
t0=time.time()
model, alphabet = esm.pretrained.esm_if1_gvp4_t16_142M_UR50()
model=model.eval()
print(f"loaded {time.time()-t0:.0f}s", flush=True)

coords, native_seq = esm.inverse_folding.util.load_coords("is621_esmfold.pdb","A")
print("coords", coords.shape, "native matches:", native_seq==seq, flush=True)

device='cpu'
coords_t = torch.as_tensor(coords, dtype=torch.float32)

import esm.inverse_folding.gvp_transformer
from esm.inverse_folding.util import CoordBatchConverter
batch_converter = CoordBatchConverter(alphabet)
batch = [(coords, None, seq)]
coords_b, confidence, strs, tokens, padding_mask = batch_converter(batch, device=device)
prev_output_tokens = tokens[:, :-1]
with torch.no_grad():
    logits, extra = model.forward(coords_b, padding_mask, confidence, prev_output_tokens)
# logits: (1, vocab, L)
logits = logits[0]                       # (vocab, L)
logprobs = torch.log_softmax(logits, dim=0).numpy()   # (vocab, L)
print("logits shape", logits.shape, flush=True)

# map AA -> alphabet index
aa_idx = {a: alphabet.get_idx(a) for a in AAS}
rows=[]
for pos in range(L):
    wt=seq[pos]
    wt_lp = logprobs[aa_idx[wt], pos]
    for a in AAS:
        if a==wt: continue
        rows.append(dict(position=pos+1, wt=wt, mut=a, mutation=f"{wt}{pos+1}{a}",
                         esmif_score=float(logprobs[aa_idx[a],pos]-wt_lp)))
df=pd.DataFrame(rows)
df.to_csv("esmif_scores.csv", index=False)
print("saved esmif_scores.csv", df.shape, "favored:", (df.esmif_score>0).sum(), flush=True)
print(df.nlargest(5,'esmif_score')[['mutation','esmif_score']].to_string(index=False), flush=True)
print("DONE", flush=True)

import pandas as pd, numpy as np
import biotite.structure.io.pdb as pdbio
import biotite.structure as struc

seq = ("MEHELHYIGIDTAKEKLDVDVLRPDGRHRTKKFANTTKGHDELVSWLKGHKIDHAHICIEATGTYMEPVA"
       "ECLYDAGYIVSVINPALGKAFAQSEGLRNKTDTVDARMLAEFCRQKRPAAWEAPHPLERALRALVVRHQAL"
       "TDMHTQELNRTETAREVQRPSIDAHLLWLEAELKRLEKQIKDLTDDDPDMKHRRKLLESIPGIGEKTSAVL"
       "LAYIGLKDRFAHARQFAAFAGLTPRRYESGSSVRGASRMSKAGHVSLRRALYMPAMVATSKTEWGRAFRDRL"
       "AANGKKGKVILGAMMRKLAQVAYGVLKSGVPFDASRHNPVAA")
L=len(seq)

pdbf = pdbio.PDBFile.read("{{artifact:9294a301-bcdb-4bc2-9a4a-13cd82745c48}}")
arr = pdbf.get_structure(model=1)
arr = arr[struc.filter_amino_acids(arr)]
atom_sasa = struc.sasa(arr, vdw_radii="ProtOr")
res_sasa = struc.apply_residue_wise(arr, atom_sasa, np.nansum)

maxsasa={'A':129,'R':274,'N':195,'D':193,'C':167,'E':223,'Q':225,'G':104,'H':224,
'I':197,'L':201,'K':236,'M':224,'F':240,'P':159,'S':155,'T':172,'W':285,'Y':263,'V':174}
rel_sasa = np.array([res_sasa[i]/maxsasa[seq[i]] for i in range(L)])
rel_sasa = np.clip(rel_sasa,0,1.5)

ca = np.array([arr[(arr.res_id==i+1)&(arr.atom_name=="CA")].coord[0] for i in range(L)])
cat_pos=[11,60,102,105,241]
cat_ca = ca[[p-1 for p in cat_pos]]
cat_center = cat_ca.mean(0)
dist_to_as = np.linalg.norm(ca - cat_center, axis=1)
dist_min_cat = np.array([min(np.linalg.norm(ca[i]-cat_ca,axis=1)) for i in range(L)])

plddt = np.load("{{artifact:dec8c984-30d6-4310-8f49-10d939bb674a}}")
if plddt.max()<=1: plddt=plddt*100

feat = pd.DataFrame(dict(position=np.arange(1,L+1), wt=list(seq),
                         rel_sasa=rel_sasa, dist_to_as=dist_to_as,
                         dist_min_cat=dist_min_cat, plddt=plddt))

esm = pd.read_csv("{{artifact:0a0332ba-5904-43c8-ad2e-716dca2eeda7}}")
mpnn = pd.read_csv("{{artifact:7d7db791-3ad9-498d-8945-c7bd313eca02}}")
esmif = pd.read_csv("{{artifact:abee0a14-c6c4-4c22-b4e0-11c82a18b16c}}")

m = esm.merge(mpnn[['mutation','mpnn_score']],on='mutation').merge(esmif[['mutation','esmif_score']],on='mutation')
m = m.merge(feat[['position','rel_sasa','dist_to_as','dist_min_cat','plddt']], on='position')

for col in ['esm_score','mpnn_score','esmif_score']:
    m[col+'_z'] = (m[col]-m[col].mean())/m[col].std()

m['consensus_z'] = m[['esm_score_z','mpnn_score_z','esmif_score_z']].mean(axis=1)
m['n_favorable'] = (m[['esm_score','mpnn_score','esmif_score']]>0).sum(axis=1)
for col in ['esm_score','mpnn_score','esmif_score']:
    m[col+'_rank'] = m[col].rank(pct=True)
m['mean_pctrank'] = m[['esm_score_rank','mpnn_score_rank','esmif_score_rank']].mean(axis=1)

m.to_csv("all_methods_merged.csv", index=False)

as_shell = set(feat.loc[feat.dist_min_cat<8.0,'position'])
dnm = set(cat_pos) | as_shell

f = m.copy()
f['in_active_site'] = f.position.isin(dnm)
cand = f[(~f.in_active_site) & (f.plddt>=70) & (f.n_favorable>=2) & (f.consensus_z>0)].copy()
cand = cand[~cand.mut.isin(['C'])]

cand = cand.sort_values('consensus_z', ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
cand['rank'] = cand.index+1
cols = ['rank','mutation','position','wt','mut','esm_score','mpnn_score','esmif_score',
        'esm_score_z','mpnn_score_z','esmif_score_z','consensus_z','n_favorable',
        'mean_pctrank','rel_sasa','dist_min_cat','plddt']
ranked = cand[cols]
ranked.to_csv("ranked_candidates.csv", index=False)

mpnn = pd.read_csv("{{artifact:7d7db791-3ad9-498d-8945-c7bd313eca02}}")
esmif = pd.read_csv("{{artifact:abee0a14-c6c4-4c22-b4e0-11c82a18b16c}}")
feat = pd.read_csv("{{artifact:3e03bbca-ddaf-4cb8-b3f5-9558af207104}}")

m = esm.merge(mpnn[['mutation','mpnn_score']],on='mutation').merge(esmif[['mutation','esmif_score']],on='mutation')
m = m.merge(feat[['position','rel_sasa','dist_to_as','dist_min_cat','plddt']], on='position')

# z-normalize each method across all variants
for col in ['esm_score','mpnn_score','esmif_score']:
    m[col+'_z'] = (m[col]-m[col].mean())/m[col].std()

# consensus = mean of z-scores
m['consensus_z'] = m[['esm_score_z','mpnn_score_z','esmif_score_z']].mean(axis=1)
# agreement: how many methods call it favorable (>0)
m['n_favorable'] = (m[['esm_score','mpnn_score','esmif_score']]>0).sum(axis=1)
# rank-based consensus too (robust to scale)
for col in ['esm_score','mpnn_score','esmif_score']:
    m[col+'_rank'] = m[col].rank(pct=True)
m['mean_pctrank'] = m[['esm_score_rank','mpnn_score_rank','esmif_score_rank']].mean(axis=1)

# --- Engineering filters ---
cat_pos=[11,60,102,105,241]
# do-not-mutate: catalytic residues + immediate active-site shell (within 8 A of any catalytic CA)
as_shell = set(feat.loc[feat.dist_min_cat<8.0,'position']) 
dnm = set(cat_pos) | as_shell

f = m.copy()
f['in_active_site'] = f.position.isin(dnm)
cand = f[(~f.in_active_site) & (f.plddt>=70) & (f.n_favorable>=2) & (f.consensus_z>0)].copy()
# discourage introducing Cys (free thiol) and Pro (backbone) unless very strong
cand = cand[~cand.mut.isin(['C'])]

cand = cand.sort_values('consensus_z', ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
cand['rank'] = cand.index+1
cols = ['rank','mutation','position','wt','mut','esm_score','mpnn_score','esmif_score',
        'esm_score_z','mpnn_score_z','esmif_score_z','consensus_z','n_favorable',
        'mean_pctrank','rel_sasa','dist_min_cat','plddt']
ranked = cand[cols]

# Best substitution per position, then rank positions by their best consensus_z
best_per_pos = ranked.sort_values('consensus_z',ascending=False).drop_duplicates('position').reset_index(drop=True)
best_per_pos['pos_rank']=best_per_pos.index+1
best_per_pos.to_csv("ranked_candidates_by_position.csv", index=False)

# rank-based consensus too (robust to scale)

m['mean_pctrank'] = m[['esm_score_rank','mpnn_score_rank','esmif_score_rank']].mean(axis=1)

# --- Engineering filters ---
cat_pos=[11,60,102,105,241]

best_per_pos = ranked.sort_values('consensus_z',ascending=False).drop_duplicates('position').reset_index(drop=True)

top5 = best_per_pos.head(5).copy()

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2,3, figsize=(16,9))

# Row 1: pairwise scatter of z-scores

for ax,(xc,yc,xl,yl) in zip(axes[0],pairs):

    for _,r in t5.iterrows():

for s,e,c,nm in [(1,122,'#4C72B0','RuvC'),(123,188,'#DD8452','CC'),(189,326,'#55A868','Tnp')]:

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import biotite.structure.io.pdb as pdbio
import biotite.structure as struc

seq = ("MEHELHYIGIDTAKEKLDVDVLRPDGRHRTKKFANTTKGHDELVSWLKGHKIDHAHICIEATGTYMEPVA"
       "ECLYDAGYIVSVINPALGKAFAQSEGLRNKTDTVDARMLAEFCRQKRPAAWEAPHPLERALRALVVRHQAL"
       "TDMHTQELNRTETAREVQRPSIDAHLLWLEAELKRLEKQIKDLTDDDPDMKHRRKLLESIPGIGEKTSAVL"
       "LAYIGLKDRFAHARQFAAFAGLTPRRYESGSSVRGASRMSKAGHVSLRRALYMPAMVATSKTEWGRAFRDRL"
       "AANGKKGKVILGAMMRKLAQVAYGVLKSGVPFDASRHNPVAA")
L = len(seq)

pdbf = pdbio.PDBFile.read("{{artifact:9294a301-bcdb-4bc2-9a4a-13cd82745c48}}")
arr = pdbf.get_structure(model=1)
arr = arr[struc.filter_amino_acids(arr)]
# Shrake-Rupley SASA per atom -> sum per residue
atom_sasa = struc.sasa(arr, vdw_radii="ProtOr")
res_ids, res_sasa = struc.apply_residue_wise(arr, atom_sasa, np.nansum), None
res_sasa = struc.apply_residue_wise(arr, atom_sasa, np.nansum)
print("n residues SASA:", len(res_sasa), "L", L)

# Max SASA (Tien 2013 theoretical) for relative SASA
maxsasa={'A':129,'R':274,'N':195,'D':193,'C':167,'E':223,'Q':225,'G':104,'H':224,
'I':197,'L':201,'K':236,'M':224,'F':240,'P':159,'S':155,'T':172,'W':285,'Y':263,'V':174}
rel_sasa = np.array([res_sasa[i]/maxsasa[seq[i]] for i in range(L)])
rel_sasa = np.clip(rel_sasa,0,1.5)
print("mean relSASA:", rel_sasa.mean().round(3), "| buried(<0.15):", (rel_sasa<0.15).sum())

# --- Active-site distance: min distance of each residue (any atom) to catalytic atoms ---
cat_pos=[11,60,102,105,241]
ca = np.array([arr[(arr.res_id==i+1)&(arr.atom_name=="CA")].coord[0] for i in range(L)])
# center of catalytic CAs
cat_ca = ca[[p-1 for p in cat_pos]]
cat_center = cat_ca.mean(0)
dist_to_as = np.linalg.norm(ca - cat_center, axis=1)   # per-residue CA dist to active-site centroid
# also min CA-CA distance to any catalytic residue
dist_min_cat = np.array([min(np.linalg.norm(ca[i]-cat_ca,axis=1)) for i in range(L)])
print("dist_to_as range:", dist_to_as.min().round(1), dist_to_as.max().round(1))

plddt = np.load("{{artifact:dec8c984-30d6-4310-8f49-10d939bb674a}}")
if plddt.max()<=1: plddt=plddt*100

feat = pd.DataFrame(dict(position=np.arange(1,L+1), wt=list(seq),
                         rel_sasa=rel_sasa, dist_to_as=dist_to_as,
                         dist_min_cat=dist_min_cat, plddt=plddt))
feat.to_csv("structural_features.csv", index=False)
print(feat.head(3).to_string(index=False))

# Need the WT and mut images for L168A

import pymol
from pymol import cmd

three = {'A':'ALA','R':'ARG','N':'ASN','D':'ASP','C':'CYS','E':'GLU','Q':'GLN',
'G':'GLY','H':'HIS','I':'ILE','L':'LEU','K':'LYS','M':'MET','F':'PHE','P':'PRO',
'S':'SER','T':'THR','W':'TRP','Y':'TYR','V':'VAL'}
cat = [11,60,102,105,241]
catstr = "+".join(map(str,cat))

pymol.finish_launching(['pymol','-cq'])

def base_settings():
    cmd.set("max_threads",1)
    cmd.set("ray_trace_mode",1); cmd.set("ray_shadows",0); cmd.set("antialias",2)
    cmd.set("cartoon_fancy_helices",1); cmd.set("cartoon_transparency",0.5)
    cmd.set("stick_radius",0.2); cmd.set("label_size",22); cmd.set("label_color","black")
    cmd.set("label_outline_color","white")
    cmd.bg_color("white")

def domain_color(obj):
    cmd.color("skyblue", f"{obj} and resi 1-122")
    cmd.color("wheat",   f"{obj} and resi 123-188")
    cmd.color("palegreen",f"{obj} and resi 189-326")

def render_panel(pos, label, ccolor, outpng):
    """Render current object 'm' focused on residue pos."""
    cmd.hide("everything")
    cmd.show("cartoon","m")
    domain_color("m")
    cmd.show("sticks", f"m and resi {catstr} and not name N+C+O")
    cmd.color("red", f"m and resi {catstr} and elem C")
    tsel=f"m and resi {pos}"
    cmd.show("sticks", tsel + " and not name N+C+O")
    cmd.color(ccolor, tsel + " and elem C")
    cmd.select("nb", f"byres (m within 5 of ({tsel})) and not ({tsel}) and polymer")
    cmd.show("sticks","nb and not (name N+C+O)")
    cmd.color("gray70","nb and elem C")
    cmd.util.cnc(f"(nb or {tsel} or (m and resi {catstr})) and not name N+C+O")
    cmd.orient(f"(byres (m within 7 of ({tsel})))")
    cmd.zoom(f"(byres (m within 7 of ({tsel})))", 2)
    cmd.label(f"{tsel} and name CA", f'"{label}"')
    cmd.ray(1000,950)
    cmd.png(outpng, dpi=150)
    cmd.label(f"{tsel} and name CA", '""')

# Only render L168A
mrec = next(m for m in top5 if m["mutation"] == "L168A")
pos=mrec["position"]; wt=mrec["wt"]; mut=mrec["mut"]; name=mrec["mutation"]

# WT panel (fresh load)
cmd.delete("all"); cmd.load("{{artifact:9294a301-bcdb-4bc2-9a4a-13cd82745c48}}","m"); base_settings()
render_panel(pos, f"{wt}{pos}", "orange", f"top5_{name}_wt.png")

# MUT panel (fresh load + mutate)
cmd.delete("all"); cmd.load("{{artifact:9294a301-bcdb-4bc2-9a4a-13cd82745c48}}","m"); base_settings()
cmd.wizard("mutagenesis")
cmd.do("refresh_wizard")
cmd.get_wizard().set_mode(three[mut])
cmd.get_wizard().do_select(f"m///{pos}/")
cmd.frame(1)
cmd.get_wizard().apply()
cmd.set_wizard()
resn = cmd.get_model(f"m and resi {pos} and name CA").atom[0].resn
render_panel(pos, f"{mut}{pos}", "marine", f"top5_{name}_mut.png")
print(f"rendered {name}: residue {pos} now {resn}", flush=True)

desc = {
 "L168A":"Coiled-coil helix. Buried Leu\u2192Ala. ESM strongly favors (z=+2.6 ESM).",
 "N322L":"C-terminal Tnp tail. Polar Asn\u2192hydrophobic Leu; both IF methods favor.",
 "T152L":"Coiled-coil helix. Thr\u2192Leu, improves helical/core packing.",
 "S258L":"Tnp helix. Exposed Ser\u2192Leu; all 3 methods agree.",
 "H224N":"Tnp loop/helix. His\u2192Asn, relieves buried-charge penalty.",
}

wt_img=imread(f"top5_{name}_wt.png"); mt_img=imread(f"top5_{name}_mut.png")
fig,axes=plt.subplots(1,2,figsize=(13,6.2))
axes[0].imshow(wt_img); axes[0].set_title(f"Wild-type  {mrec['wt']}{mrec['position']}",fontsize=13,fontweight='bold')
axes[1].imshow(mt_img); axes[1].set_title(f"Mutant  {mrec['wt']}{mrec['position']}{mrec['mut']}",fontsize=13,fontweight='bold',color='#1f4e9e')
for ax in axes: ax.axis('off')
cap=(f"{name}  |  consensus z = {mrec['consensus_z']:.2f}  |  rel.SASA {mrec['rel_sasa']:.2f}  |  "
     f"{mrec['dist_min_cat']:.0f}\u00c5 to active site  |  pLDDT {mrec['plddt']:.0f}\n{desc[name]}\n"
     "Red sticks = catalytic DEDD/Ser; gray = residues within 5\u00c5; domain colors: RuvC=blue, coiled-coil=wheat, Tnp=green")
fig.suptitle(cap, fontsize=9.5, y=0.04, va='bottom')
fig.tight_layout(rect=[0,0.10,1,1])
fig.savefig(f"top5_mut_{name}.png", dpi=130, bbox_inches='tight'); plt.close(fig)
print("panel", name)
print("done")
